title: Commit window closing: PR 102 follow-up closeout
body: Lush Rustling Bark committed the source chunks for the PR 102 follow-up closeout: 7d09edb2 for branch-touched-files live review-thread fixes and 8ad0f1e8 for ESLint defineConfig plus lint cleanup. Closing git:index/head claim ae9c25fd before landing the final continuity state chunk.
